name: Ribbed Bath Tray White - Room Essentials™
description:
Say goodbye to bathroom counter clutter with this Ribbed Bath Tray from Room Essentials™. Designed in a rectangular silhouette, this resin tray features raised edges that help keep small vanity items or bottles contained. Featuring an off-white hue and showcasing a ribbed finish on the sides, it's sure to bring sleek style to your bathroom decor.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
